TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cawi ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 435 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 419 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cawi hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cawi hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cawi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cawi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cawi hya' ga Tisilan. tay mkyahu' na Cawi hya' ga Tafugan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cawi ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨawi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa tis~ɕilan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa ta*uɣan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨawi ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cawi ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 151 buwan, 435 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 419 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cawi hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cawi hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cawi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cawi hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cawi hya' ga Tisilan. tay mkyahu' na Cawi hya' ga Tafugan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cawi ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨawi ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa tis~ɕilan. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨawi ħjaʔ ɣa ta*uɣan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨawi ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
